subcodes.first_line: The Divine Lote-Tree calleth out through its branches, counseling them to steadfast constancy in this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان سدره المنتهی تنادی افنانها و توصیهم بالاستقامه الکبری علی هذا الامر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
